{{Infobox character
| name = Burning Swan
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Burning Swan]] is [[Kerani]]'s personal bound fire spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Burning Swan]] is an artifact that can vibrate in its case and attempt to extend fiery wings.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Burning Swan]] is a creature or entity that [[Kerani]] commanded to attack.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
